trigger.description: The memory was persisted, but remember-time curation candidate proposal failed.
setup_commands: ee remember 'J6 auto propose seed one.' --level semantic --kind fact --tags j6-auto-propose --no-auto-link --no-propose-candidates --workspace . --json
ee remember 'J6 auto propose seed two.' --level semantic --kind fact --tags j6-auto-propose --no-auto-link --no-propose-candidates --workspace . --json
trigger.invocation: ee remember 'J6 auto propose triggering memory.' --level semantic --kind fact --tags j6-auto-propose --no-auto-link --workspace . --json

expected_emission.repair_string: Run `ee curate candidates --json` and inspect the review queue.
